query: SELECT e.id, e.seriesId, e.seasonNumber, e.episodeNumber, e.title, e.videoUrl, e.thumbnail, s.title as seriesTitle, s.image as seriesImage FROM episodes e LEFT JOIN series s ON e.seriesId = s.id ORDER BY e.seriesId, e.seasonNumber, e.episodeNumber;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 4W5PAba9uynui42.b7caf63a08e3 --database NpXwGYEEh9MzoQzGANzYad --execute SELECT e.id, e.seriesId, e.seasonNumber, e.episodeNumber, e.title, e.videoUrl, e.thumbnail, s.title as seriesTitle, s.image as seriesImage FROM episodes e LEFT JOIN series s ON e.seriesId = s.id ORDER BY e.seriesId, e.seasonNumber, e.episodeNumber;
